app.title: Tenant Platform
app.notImplemented: This module will be implemented in a later stage

登录后默认进入仪表盘页面: You land on the dashboard after signing in
查看顶部统计卡片了解平台概况: Review the top statistic cards for a platform overview
点击快捷入口快速进入常用功能模块: Use quick access buttons to open common modules
左侧菜单可访问所有管理模块: Use the left navigation to access all modules
统计数据实时更新，来源于后端接口: Statistics update in real time from backend APIs
若统计数据加载失败，请检查网络连接: If statistics fail to load, check the network connection
左侧菜单 → 平台管理体系 → 用户管理: Left Menu -> Platform Management -> User Management
点击【新增用户】按钮创建管理员账号: Click Create User to create an administrator account
在列表中使用搜索框按用户名/邮箱筛选: Use the search box to filter by username or email
点击【编辑】修改用户信息: Click Edit to modify user information
点击【禁用/启用】切换用户状态: Click Disable or Enable to change user status
用户名：全局唯一，创建后不可修改: Username: globally unique and cannot be changed after creation
邮箱：用于接收系统通知: Email: used to receive system notifications
密码：初始密码需告知用户，建议登录后修改: Password: share the initial password with the user and ask them to change it after login
用户名已存在时创建将失败: Creation fails if the username already exists
禁用超级管理员需谨慎操作: Be careful when disabling a super administrator
管理平台管理员账号，包括创建、编辑、启用/禁用、重置密码等操作。: Manage platform administrator accounts, including create, edit, enable or disable, and password reset operations.
仅限平台管理员，非租户用户。: Platform administrators only, not tenant users.
需要 platform:user:view 权限查看列表，platform:us: Viewing requires platform:user:view and creating requires platform:user:create.
禁用用户将导致该用户无法登录平台。: Disabled users will no longer be able to sign in.
左侧菜单 → 租户生命周期体系 → 租户管理: Left Menu -> Tenant Lifecycle -> Tenant Management
点击【新增租户】按钮填写租户基本信息: Click Create Tenant and fill in the tenant basics
在列表中搜索或按状态筛选租户: Search the list or filter tenants by status
点击【编辑】修改租户信息: Click Edit to modify tenant information
使用【激活/暂停/关闭】按钮管理租户生命周期: Use Activate, Suspend, or Close to manage the tenant lifecycle
租户编码：全局唯一，创建后不可修改: Tenant code: globally unique and cannot be changed after creation
隔离模式：决定数据隔离方式，创建后通常不可变更: Isolation mode: defines data isolation and is usually not changed after creation
联系邮箱：用于接收系统通知和账单: Contact email: used for system notifications and billing
租户编码重复时创建将失败: Creation fails if the tenant code already exists
关闭租户后数据将被保留但服务不可用: Data is retained after closing a tenant, but services become unavailable
管理所有租户的基本信息和生命周期状态，包括开通、暂停、关闭等操作。: Manage tenant profile data and lifecycle states, including opening, suspending, and closing tenants.
全平台所有租户数据。: All tenant data across the platform.
需要 tenant:list:view 权限查看列表，tenant:list:c: Viewing requires tenant:list:view and creating requires tenant:list:create.
关闭租户将导致该租户下所有服务不可用，请谨慎操作。: Closing a tenant will make all services under that tenant unavailable. Proceed carefully.
该模块将在后续阶段实现: This module will be implemented later
左侧菜单 → 平台管理体系 → 角色管理: Left Menu -> Platform Management -> Role Management
点击【新增角色】按钮填写角色编码、名称和描述: Click Create Role and fill in the role code, name, and description
在列表中搜索或按状态筛选角色: Search roles or filter by status
点击【禁用/启用】切换角色状态: Click Disable or Enable to change the role status
点击【绑定权限】为角色分配权限码: Click Bind Permissions to assign permission codes to the role
点击【绑定成员】将用户添加到角色: Click Bind Members to add users to the role
角色编码：全局唯一，创建后不可修改: Role code: globally unique and cannot be changed after creation
角色名称：用于界面显示的友好名称: Role name: a display-friendly name shown in the UI
描述：角色的职责和权限范围说明: Description: explains the role responsibility and permission scope
角色编码已存在时创建将失败: Creation fails when the role code already exists
禁用角色后绑定该角色的用户将失去对应权限: Users bound to a disabled role lose the corresponding permissions
删除角色前需先解除所有权限和成员绑定: Remove all permission and member bindings before deleting a role
平台角色管理用于定义不同管理角色及其权限范围，支持角色的创建、编辑、启禁用以及权: Platform role management defines management roles and their permission scopes, and supports creating, editing, enabling or disabling, and binding permissions and members.
仅限平台级别角色，非租户角色。: Platform-level roles only, not tenant roles.
需要 platform:role:view 权限查看列表，platform:ro: Viewing requires platform:role:view and creating requires platform:role:create.
禁用角色将导致绑定该角色的用户失去对应权限。: Disabling a role causes bound users to lose the corresponding permissions.
左侧菜单 → 平台管理体系 → 权限管理: Left Menu -> Platform Management -> Permission Management
进入权限管理页面查看平台所有权限的层级结构: Open the permission page to inspect the full permission hierarchy
使用搜索框按权限编码或名称筛选: Use the search box to filter by permission code or name
展开/折叠树节点查看子权限: Expand or collapse tree nodes to inspect child permissions
权限编码：唯一标识，格式为 模块:资源:操作: Permission code: unique identifier in Module:Resource:Action format
权限类型：菜单权限控制页面可见性，API权限控制接口访问，操作权限控制按钮可用性: Permission type: menu permissions control page visibility, API permissions control endpoint access, and operation permissions control button availability
路径和方法：仅API权限类型会显示对应的HTTP路径和方法: Path and method are shown only for API permission types
权限数据由系统种子数据管理，无法在此页面直接修改: Permission data is managed by system seed data and cannot be edited here
权限管理展示平台所有权限码的层级结构，包含菜单权限、API权限和操作权限。: Permission management displays the hierarchy of all platform permission codes, including menu, API, and operation permissions.
平台全部权限数据（由系统种子数据维护）。: All platform permission data maintained by system seed data.
需要 platform:permission:view 权限查看权限树。: Viewing the permission tree requires platform:permission:view.
权限数据由系统种子数据管理，此页面仅供查看，不支持直接编辑。: Permission data is managed by system seed data. This page is read-only and does not support direct editing.
左侧菜单 → SaaS 套餐系统 → 套餐管理: Left Menu -> SaaS Packages -> Package Management
点击【新增套餐】按钮创建新的 SaaS 套餐: Click Create Package to create a new SaaS package
在列表中搜索套餐编码或名称: Search package code or name in the list
点击【启用/禁用】切换套餐状态: Click Enable or Disable to change package status
套餐编码：业务唯一标识，创建后不可修改: Package code: business unique identifier and cannot be changed after creation
套餐名称：用于显示的名称: Package name: display name shown to users
禁用套餐不影响已有订阅，但新订阅将无法选择该套餐: Disabling a package does not affect existing subscriptions, but new subscriptions cannot select it
套餐管理用于维护 SaaS 平台的产品套餐定义，包括套餐的创建、编辑、启用与禁用: Package management maintains SaaS product package definitions, including creation, editing, enabling, and disabling. Packages are the basis for subscriptions and billing.
需要 package:list:view 权限查看列表，package:list: Viewing requires package:list:view, creating requires package:list:create, and editing requires package:list:update.
禁用套餐后，已关联的订阅不受影响，但新订阅将无法选择该套餐。: After a package is disabled, linked subscriptions remain unaffected, but new subscriptions cannot select it.
左侧菜单 → SaaS 套餐系统 → 版本管理: Left Menu -> SaaS Packages -> Version Management
先输入套餐ID并查询，查看该套餐下的版本列表: Enter a package ID and search to view the versions under that package
点击【新增版本】按钮创建新的套餐版本: Click Create Version to add a new package version
设置版本的定价、计费周期和试用天数: Set the version price, billing cycle, and trial days
版本编码：同一套餐下唯一标识，创建后不可修改: Version code: unique within the same package and cannot be changed after creation
版本类型：Free（免费）、Basic（基础）、Standard（标准）、Pro: Edition type: Free, Basic, Standard, Professional, or Enterprise
计费周期：Monthly（月付）、Quarterly（季付）、Yearly（年付: Billing cycle: Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly, or OneTime
试用天数：该版本允许的免费试用天数，0 表示不支持试用: Trial days: number of free trial days allowed for the version; 0 means no trial
默认版本：标记为默认版本后，新订阅将默认选择该版本: Default version: once marked as default, new subscriptions choose it by default
同一套餐下版本编码不能重复: Version code must be unique within the same package
版本关联订阅后不建议删除，建议通过有效期控制生命周期: Do not delete versions linked to subscriptions; control their lifecycle through effective dates instead
版本管理用于维护 SaaS 套餐的版本信息，包括定价、计费周期、试用天数等。每个: Version management maintains SaaS package versions, including pricing, billing cycle, and trial days. Each package can have multiple versions.
全平台所有套餐版本记录。: All package version records across the platform.
需要 package:version:view 权限查看列表，package:v: Viewing requires package:version:view and creating requires package:version:create.
版本一旦关联订阅后不建议删除，建议通过设置有效期来控制版本生命周期。: Once a version is linked to subscriptions, deletion is not recommended; use effective dates to control lifecycle instead.
搜索租户ID / 套餐版本ID: Search tenant ID / package version ID
左侧菜单 → 订阅管理体系 → 订阅管理: Left Menu -> Subscription System -> Subscription Management
点击【新增订阅】按钮为租户创建新的套餐订阅: Click Create Subscription to create a new package subscription for a tenant
在列表中搜索或按状态筛选订阅记录: Search subscription records or filter by status
点击【取消】终止有效订阅: Click Cancel to terminate an active subscription
租户ID：关联的租户标识: Tenant ID: identifier of the linked tenant
套餐版本ID：关联的套餐版本标识: Package version ID: identifier of the linked package version
SubscriptionType 说明：New（新订阅）、Upgrade（升级）: SubscriptionType: New, Upgrade, Downgrade, or Renewal
自动续费：勾选后到期时自动生成续费订阅: Auto renew: when enabled, a renewal subscription is created automatically at expiration
同一租户不能同时拥有多个有效订阅: A tenant cannot have multiple active subscriptions at the same time
订阅管理用于维护租户的套餐订阅关系，包括新订阅、续费、升降级和取消。每个租户在同: Subscription management maintains tenant-to-package subscription relationships, including new subscriptions, renewals, upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations. Each tenant has only one active subscription at a time.
全平台所有租户的订阅记录。: All tenant subscription records across the platform.
需要 subscription:list:view 权限查看列表，subscri: Viewing requires subscription:list:view, creating requires subscription:list:create, and cancelling requires subscription:list:cancel.
取消订阅将导致租户无法继续使用对应套餐，请谨慎操作。: Cancelling a subscription prevents the tenant from continuing to use the associated package. Proceed carefully.
左侧菜单 → 日志与审计 → 操作日志: Left Menu -> Logs & Audit -> Operation Logs
在列表中查看所有操作日志记录: View all operation log records in the list
使用搜索框按操作类型、资源类型或 IP 地址筛选: Use the search box to filter by action, resource type, or IP address
使用下拉框按操作结果筛选: Use the dropdown to filter by operation result
点击任意行查看日志详情: Click any row to view log details
操作者类型：区分平台管理员和租户用户: Operator type: distinguishes platform administrators from tenant users
操作结果：标识操作是否成功: Operation result: indicates whether the action succeeded
IP 地址：记录操作发起方的网络地址: IP address: records the network address of the action initiator
日志数据为只读，无法编辑或删除: Log data is read-only and cannot be edited or deleted
操作日志记录平台和租户的所有管理操作，支持按时间、操作类型和结果进行筛选。用于问: Operation logs record all platform and tenant management actions, support filtering by time, action type, and result, and are used for traceability and security auditing.
全平台所有操作记录。: All operation records across the platform.
操作日志为只读数据，不可修改或删除。: Operation logs are read-only and cannot be modified or deleted.
common.contact_admin_or_retry: Please contact admin or try again later
common.system_busy: System busy, please try again later
auth.login_success_password_expired: Login succeeded, please change your password soon
quota.limit_invalid: Quota limit must be greater than 0
notification.template_status_change_fail: Failed to change notification template status
notification.mark_read_failed: Failed to mark notification as read
storage.strategy_status_change_failed: Failed to change storage strategy status
storage.file_access_policy_save_failed: Failed to save file access policy
